====Pokémon====
=====On hand=====
{{anchor|Weavile 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Cyrus
|pkmn=Weavile
|type1=Dark
|type2=Ice
|img=Cyrus Weavile DPA.png
|epnum=DPA08
|epname=Team Galactic's Conspiracy, Revealed!!
|desc=Cyrus sent out {{p|Weavile}} to battle Hareta. Hareta uses {{TP|Hareta|Piplup}} to battle it. Even though Weavile had the upper hand, it was hereby defeated after a surprise attack from Piplup.

Weavile's known moves are {{m|Night Slash}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, and {{m|Hyper Beam}}.}}

{{anchor|Gyarados 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Cyrus
|pkmn=Gyarados
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Cyrus Gyarados DPA.png
|epnum=DPA08
|epname=Team Galactic's Conspiracy, Revealed!!
|desc={{p|Gyarados}} was sent out after his Weavile suffered tons of damage from Piplup's surprise attack. Gyarados used Giga Impact to send them away, thus ending the battle. Later, during Hareta's rematch after Saturn's loss, Cyrus had his Gyarados battle Hareta and his Piplup despite the former feeling weak due to {{TP|Saturn|Toxicroak}}'s {{m|Poison Jab|poisoning}} that happened earlier. The battle was declared as a draw when Cyrus and the others retreated after witnessing Piplup's {{a|Torrent|giant}} {{m|Surf|wave}}.

Gyarados's known moves are {{m|Giga Impact}}, {{m|Dragon Dance}}, and {{m|Bite}}.}}

=====Controlled=====
{{anchor|Dialga 5}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Cyrus
|pkmn=Dialga
|type1=Steel
|type2=Dragon
|img=Cyrus Dialga DPA.png
|epnum=DPA20
|epname=The Advent of the Legendary Pokémon!!
|desc=Cyrus successfully controlled {{p|Dialga}} after he gained control of the Red Chain. Dialga was a very powerful Pokémon that was able to use time as an advantage in its battle. However, when Hareta tried to snap Dialga out of Cyrus's control, it was able to flee from Cyrus.

Dialga's known moves are {{m|Roar of Time}}, {{m|Ancient Power}}, and {{m|Dragon Claw}}.}}

=====Stolen=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Mitsumi
|pkmn=Eevee
|type1=Normal
|gender=Male
|img=Mitsumi Eevee.png
|epnum=DPA17
|epname=Clash!! Hareta vs. Mitsumi!
|desc=In order to force [[Mitsumi]] into rejoining [[Team Galactic]], Cyrus kidnaps her favorite {{p|Eevee}}, locks him in a cage and holds him hostage, threatening to kill Eevee if she refuses. To save Eevee's life, Mitsumi caves in to the blackmail and rejoins Team Galactic. Later on, Cyrus forces Mitsumi to battle [[Hareta]] with the mission to defeat him. To make sure Mitsumi cooperates, he would torture Eevee every time she disobeyed him. After Hareta defeats Mitsumi, {{OBP|Jun|DPA}} and his {{p|Dragonite}} take Eevee away from Cyrus and return him to his trainer.

None of Eevee's moves are known.}}
